chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.D-29 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of main case 01.04.2026 None have appeared on behalf of the applicant since the date of institution of this application. Meanwhile, this matter was listed on 15.01.2026, 27.01.2026, 10.02.2026, 24.03.2026 and once again today, when no one has appeared on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. It appears that the applicant has lost interest in pursuing this application. Accordingly, same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
